narrative:
Clark County has 83,915 registered voters, with 56.5% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.6% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 16.8%, a clear Republican lean of 9.8 percentage points. Baby Boomers are the largest generational cohort at 30.0% of registrants. Registration is trending bluer in younger age cohorts (1990s–2000s births lean -5.7% D−R vs -13.1% for 1950s–60s cohorts).
